response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and open-source experience, but he fundamentally lacks the executive leadership profile required for this CTO position. He does not have the mandatory 5+ years of senior technical leadership experience scaling engineering organizations, nor does he possess deep production expertise in AI-native fintech infrastructure and complex multi-agent orchestration.
strengths: Extensive hands-on background in backend development and high-throughput microservices.
Recent practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Entrepreneurial initiative demonstrated by founding and maintaining a full-stack open-source platform.
concerns: Zero executive-level engineering leadership or team-scaling experience (e.g., growing teams from 10 to 30+).
Insufficient production experience with complex, multi-agent AI orchestration in high-stakes commercial environments.
Lacks deep domain expertise in fintech infrastructure, real-time credit risk, or algorithmic working-capital management.
